title: Persona Bundle Acquisition Receipt (B-U1/U15, extended by B-U8/U22)
description: The canonical shape routing/persona-bundle-receipt.json must carry — written by 06-ghl-install-pages/tools/persona_bundle_ladder.py::resolve_persona_bundle() and read by shared-utils/fab_qc.py's D4 v2 bundle-aware voice grounding (B-U5/U19). Validated offline by shared-utils/persona_bundle_receipt_schema.py; enforced in CI by scripts/guard-fab-qc-gate.sh (B-U8/U22 bundle-receipt schema check).

task_id.description: the task/board id the bundle was acquired for, or null when unknown

source.description: first-hit-wins ladder rung: threaded (caller supplied) -> cc (Command Center fetch) -> local (--blend selector) -> absent (no bundle anywhere, legacy no-op)

bundle_sha.description: sha256[:16] of the raw acquired bundle; null when source=absent

voice_persona_id.description: the resolved VOICE persona id D4 v2 grounds on when the receipt is ACTIVE (source != absent)

task_personas.description: ordered task-slot persona records; empty array (never null) when none were carried

confirm_state.description: n/a only when source=absent; pending only when the bundle's audience confirmation has not landed

degradation.description: non-null ONLY on a standalone (no CC connection) run with confirm_state=pending — names the neutral topic-only house-voice degradation; never silent

hold.description: true ONLY when confirm_state=pending on a CC-connected run (source in threaded/cc); a HOLD and a degradation are mutually exclusive

allOf.description: hold=true only ever co-occurs with confirm_state=pending
degradation is named only when confirm_state=pending (never on confirmed/n/a)
hold and degradation are mutually exclusive (never both truthy on the same receipt)
